leadText: Fickle Beam (Japanese: きまぐレーザー Fickle Laser) is a damage-dealing Dragon-type move introduced during Generation IX, in The Indigo Disk. It is one of the signature moves of Hydrapple.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Fickle Beam inflicts damage. It has a 30% chance to have its power doubled to 160. Consequently, the average base power is 104.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V The user shoots a beam of light to inflict damage. Sometimes all the user's heads shoot beams in unison, doubling the move's power.
